text:
<%me>さん！
ありがとう！
すごく楽しみに待ってたのよ！

この素材だけど、想像以上に
良さそうな予感がする！
よく燃えそうだし、頑丈だわ！

これで新しい料理を作れると思うと
ワクワクしてくるわー！
さっそく厨房に向かわなきゃ。

本当に助かったわ！
またお願いすることもあると思うけど
その時は

Hey, <%me>!
Just the person I wanted to see!

Those look even better than I could have ever
imagined! They'll cook things up perfectly, and
they're nice and sturdy to boot!

I get so excited when I think about being able
to create a new dish with this!
I gotta get to the kitchen and get cooking.

Thanks for helping out! I'm sure I'll have
more for you to do, so I hope you'll come
back and lend me a hand every now and then.
Good luck!
